excalidraw_official.note: Official open-source Excalidraw MCP App from excalidraw/excalidraw-mcp. Use for prompt-to-diagram Excalidraw generation and interactive MCP App rendering.

excalidraw_mcp.note: Local MCP endpoint served by the same browser canvas process. Tools update the live local Excalidraw canvas at http://127.0.0.1:43219/.

excalidraw_mcp_stdio.note: Fallback stdio MCP server for clients that cannot connect to the local browser canvas HTTP endpoint.
